## New Files (21 total in `extensions/pulseboard/`)

### Root-level wiring
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `openclaw.plugin.json` | Plugin manifest (id: `pulseboard`, channel: `pulseboard`) |

### `src/` implementation
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `channel.ts` | Main plugin definition via `createChatChannelPlugin` — configures capabilities (`direct` + `group` chat types), media support, **4000-character text chunk limit**, directory, status, gateway lifecycle, pairing, security, and outbound routing |

| `config-schema.ts` | Zod schema for channel config with DM policy, group policy, boards, API URL/token |
| `config-ui-hints.ts` | UI hint labels for config fields |
| `accounts.ts` | Multi-account resolution with env var support (`PULSEBOARD_API_URL`, `PULSEBOARD_API_TOKEN`, `PULSEBOARD_DISPLAY_NAME`, `PULSEBOARD_BOARDS`) and secret file reading |
| `normalize.ts` | Target normalization — `#board` prefix for group boards, plain handles for DMs; allowlist matching |
| `policy.ts` | Group access policy, mention gating, and sender allowlist resolution |
| `probe.ts` | Health-check probe against the PulseBoard `/health` endpoint |
| `send.ts` | Outbound message delivery to boards (`/boards/{name}/messages`) or DMs (`/dm/{handle}/messages`) |
| `monitor.ts` | Inbound message polling against `/events` endpoint with abort signal support |
| `setup-core.ts` | Setup adapter with config patching helpers |
| `setup-surface.ts` | Full setup wizard with env-var detection, text inputs, group access, allowlist, and DM policy |
